prose:
Frontier-orbital gap (HOMO–LUMO) of triplet O₂

Method provenance
• Property: HOMO–LUMO gap, orbital energies (eV)
• Level of theory: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier “standard”), RI density fitting on; UKS open-shell treatment
• Geometry provenance: fixed experimental bond length geometry supplied by user (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz); no further relaxation (single-point only)
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
• Charge 0, multiplicity 3
• Software: PySCF 2.x via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill
• Convergence: SCF converged in 7 cycles (scf_converged: true). No warnings reported by the engine.
• Live log: calculation streamed to a frontier_orbitals_<timestamp>.out file in the current working directory (written live during the run; inspect with tail ‑f if desired).

Results
• HOMO energy  −8.8739616 eV
• LUMO energy  −3.5859031 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap  5.2880586 eV

Integrity check: engine integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true.
The value is a computed result; no experimental comparison was requested or provided.
